rationale: The raw diagnostic did not recognize the already source-backed B12 route relation as a fully reviewed occurrence binding. Accepted anchor review b12-route-improvement-initiative-2024-01 and approved occurrence occurrence:5110ac089234f4641e170f5e bind this exact January 2024 launch only to canonical route route_b12-ace/GTFS B12. The raw route gap is therefore superseded and not applicable rather than a reason to mutate the wider project graph.
